The frozen proof chain remainsH1 -Nielsen¬†equivalence+residual¬†restricted-Lie¬†induction+normalized¬†Koszul‚ÄďWitt¬†coefficient¬†induction+D.1‚ÄďD.4+finite¬†filtered¬†Nielsen¬†compactness‚üĻőďS‚ČÖGőďH.The compactness mechanism also remains the corrected filtered-Nielsen one: coefficient-and-degree truncations use finite filtered Nielsen/cocycle data SN,J, not arbitrary quotient automorphisms; the finite data have invertible first Magnus layer, give finite over-G automorphisms, and their compatible inverse limit yields ő¶:F‚ÜíF with ő¶(rS‚ąí1)=rH.The measured-certificate coordinate is unchanged.
